name: creep-labyrinth
description: Dice Of The Damned — retro horror maze crawl with 3D dice combat.

scripts.build:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['.next','tsconfig.tsbuildinfo']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch (_) {} }" && next build
scripts.build:itch: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const p of ['.next','node_modules/.cache','out']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch (_) {} }" && cross-env ITCH_EXPORT=1 next build
scripts.build:crazygames-lite: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const p of ['.next','node_modules/.cache']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch (_) {} }" && cross-env CRAZYGAMES_LITE=1 ITCH_EXPORT=1 next build
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build:itch && npm run dist:mac && npm run dist:win
